type: 学术机理示意图（mechanism / pathway figure）
goal: 生成一张可直接放进电池材料类论文正文的机制示意图，强调硅碳负极循环过程中的体积演化与 SEI 演化路径，学术克制、工程化配色、可单色印刷可读

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_caption.caption: Proposed evolution mechanism of the Si@C anode during repeated lithiation/delithiation.
title_caption.position: bottom-center, italic serif or compact sans-serif, smaller font size

central_object.label: Si@C composite particle
central_object.depiction: a simplified cross-sectional sketch of a spherical Si@C particle: inner silicon nanodomains shown as small filled circles, gradient mesoporous carbon shell shown as concentric line-art, a thin continuous SEI line as the outermost boundary; line-art schematic, no 3D, no shading
central_object.position: horizontally centered, occupying roughly 30% of canvas width
central_object.style: thin line-art / engineering schematic, no 3D, no shading, no hyperreal texture

items.name: Volumetric Expansion
items.summary: particle expansion absorbed by porous C shell

items.name: SEI Stress Accumulation
items.summary: tensile stress concentrates at SEI interface

items.name: SEI Rupture
items.summary: local cracks expose fresh Si surface

items.name: SEI Reconstruction
items.summary: new SEI layer forms over exposed surface

result_region.label: Cycling Outcome
result_region.items: irreversible Li loss, increased impedance, gradual capacity fading
result_region.position: rightmost block, visually separated from stages but stylistically consistent

stage_block_style.shape: rounded rectangle (corner radius ~6px) attached to the central particle by short leader lines
stage_block_style.fill: very light slate tint #F1F5F9 by default; low-saturation warm tint #FEF3C7 only for M3, low-saturation rose tint #FEE2E2 only for M4
stage_block_style.title_text: stage name in bold sans-serif (Inter / Helvetica / Arial), 11-12pt
stage_block_style.summary_text: single phrase, 9-10pt regular, no full sentence, no period

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155
connectors.rule: connect stages in temporal order M1 → M2 → M3 → M4 → M5, no crossing, no decorative curves; only label arrows when carrying a named quantity

feedback_loop.rule: one curved dashed arrow loops back from M5 to M1, labeled 'next cycle' in italic gray

highlight_strategy.rule: for M3 use a subtle amber tint #FEF3C7 background; for M4 use a subtle rose tint #FEE2E2 background; NEVER use flames, smoke, glow, lens flare, or 3D heat-map effects

must_keep: central Si@C particle visually anchors the figure; stages flow outward in stable left-to-right reading order
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern
color palette ≤ 3 main colors plus the two pale highlight tints, must remain readable in grayscale print
only sans-serif typography, no script or display fonts
stage labels are short phrases, never full sentences
the figure must look like it came from a Journal of Power Sources / Energy Storage Materials article
avoid: exaggerated cracks, sparks, smoke, glow, lens flare, motion blur
3D rendering of battery cells, metallic highlights, glossy fills
cartoon mascots, emoji, decorative icons, hand-drawn wobble
photo-realistic photography of equipment or electrodes
marketing poster aesthetics, magazine cover aesthetics
fabricated capacity numbers, fabricated cycle numbers, fabricated reaction equations
saturated brand-style colors, neon, vivid gradients
